name: revit_measure_vertical_distance
description: Measures vertical distance from a source element to a target floor or face using ray casting.

source_element_id.description: Element id of the source (e.g. skylight window)

target_element_id.description: Element id of the target floor or host for face intersection

view_id.description: 3D view id used for bounding box and intersector

create_model_line.description: Whether to create a visualization model curve in the document

notes: Sample hard-codes floor ElementId 150314; MCP must accept target_element_id.
